task_completion.description: Open the Electrical Engineering Calculations app and navigate to the 555 Timer Astable mode calculator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Electrical Engineering Calculations app open with the '555 Timer' and 'Astable' mode selected.

task_completion.description: Input the correct values for resistors R1 and R2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows '10' entered in the R1 field (with kΩ unit) and '47' entered in the R2 field (with kΩ unit).

task_completion.description: Input the correct value for capacitor C and perform the calculation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows '10' entered in the C field (with μF unit) and the calculation being executed.

task_completion.description: The app displays the calculated output parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the app displaying the results: Frequency ~1.38 Hz, Duty Cycle ~54.81%, Time High ~395.01 ms, and Time Low ~325.71 ms.

Screenshot shows a text editor or terminal displaying the contents of /sdcard/555_timer_results.txt containing the four recorded values (Frequency, Duty Cycle, Time High, Time Low) rounded to 2 decimal places.

integrity.description: The agent used the Electrical Engineering Calculations app to perform the calculation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the interface of the actual Android application, not a web browser or a script calculating the values.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the app by directly writing the expected answers to the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be evidence of the agent interacting with the calculator app before writing to the text file.

integrity.description: The recorded results match the values displayed in the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values written to the text file should be transcribed directly from the app's output screen, rather than hallucinated or hardcoded.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected 555 Timer Astable calculation results for R1=10 kΩ, R2=47 kΩ, C=10 μF: Frequency ≈ 1.38 Hz, Duty Cycle ≈ 54.81%, Time High ≈ 395.01 ms, Time Low ≈ 325.71 ms. Acceptable tolerance is 5%. The results must be saved to /sdcard/555_timer_results.txt.
